payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model choice remain unresolved.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity disambiguation was required from the summary.

payload.intent: Compile durable memory from a chat summary about Brain architecture.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later remains an open question.
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance remains an open question.

details: Preserved open questions without converting them into decisions.
Avoided committing unsupported or ambiguous facts as current.

repair_options: If later confirmed, add Telegram as a supported channel.
If later benchmarked, record the selected cheapest model that saturates performance.
